description: Composition White round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% polyester, fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline, adidas' three stripes in navy blue appliqued on the sleeves,printed brand name and logo on the left chest, two silver stripes on the shoulder blades, and engineered with the ClimaLite technology Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in cold water below 30 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron Do not iron on prints/trims/embroidery Do not dry clean Say hello to comfort and spunk in this white t-shirt from adidas. The navy blue stripes on the shoulder are not just Adidas' logo, they also add a dose of fresh colour and style to the tee. Engineered with ClimaLite technology, the tee draws sweat away from the skin to keep you dry and comfortable at all times. Wear this versatile tee for all your sporting activities and for casual outings. Pair it with jeans or tracks for the wow effect. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
